description:
Put yourself in the paws of the cheekiest monkey in the zoo! In this hilarious first-person animal adventure, you can cause chaos, play pranks on visitors, and turn an ordinary zoo into a playground of pure monkey madness.

You're trapped in your enclosure, but you're bursting with energy. Your mission is to turn a boring day at the zoo into a wild ride full of laughter. You toss bananas at unsuspecting tourists, shake the bars to startle the crowd, and help a grumpy rhino with a favor. Every moment is a chance to be the ultimate troublemaker.

Explore your habitat, unlock silly abilities, and interact with a quirky cast of visitors and animals. From escape-style challenges to silly minigames, this is a lighthearted celebration of monkey madness.
